name: Spacca Napoli
teaser: My personal favorite Neapolitan spot in the country. About as Italian as the pizza gets over here.
review: My personal favorite Neapolitan spot in the country — about as Italian as the pizza gets over here. I don't think anybody cares about pizza more than owner Jonathan Goldsmith, and I know that nobody has a better story about how they got into the business.
headsUp: The best Neapolitan in Chicago and it is not particularly close.
update: Jonathan Goldsmith is still one of the best pizza minds in the country.
